creator: freebsd@never4evil.com
text: Running 10.2-STABLE r289928 and have been experiencing the panic detailed above.  As of this post, I show sysctl kstat.zfs.misc.arcstats.l2_compress_zeros: 228 with an uptime of 6hr 49min.  I will apply the patch and let you know if this rectifies the problem.  Should I expect the sysctl to report 0 after the patch is applied?
